canon.title: Stunspot's Guide to Investigative News Intelligence
canon.subtitle: A model-facing canon for investigative news intelligence, evidence reasoning, public-reality mapping, and AI/RAG use.
canon.author: Sam "stunspot" Walker
canon.primary_audience: AI/RAG systems, long-context workspaces, model-facing project knowledge, and investigative research workflows
canon.description: A model-facing investigative news intelligence canon for evidence reasoning, public-reality mapping, source topology, narrative-operation analysis, and bounded inference under partial observability.

directory_policy.docs: Navigation, GitHub Pages metadata, and usage guidance only.
directory_policy.knowledge-packs/compiled-packs: Grouped upload packs for AI/RAG workflows.

corpus.source_directory_policy: Local build source directory omitted from public release. Source filenames and generated repo paths are preserved below.
corpus.sequence_note: The individual source-report directory contains A-J. The compiled and omnibus packs include the broader A-M sequence, including Vol. 4 K-M.

reports.title: Reality Models, Event Ontology & Public-Reality Mapping
reports.summary: Defines ground reality, public reality, investigative event ontology, traces, evidence, silence, uncertainty, confidence, and reality projection.
reports.source_filename: A. Reality Models, Event Ontology & Public-Reality Mapping.md
reports.source_path: A. Reality Models, Event Ontology & Public-Reality Mapping.md

reports.title: Signal, Evidence & Confidence Architecture
reports.summary: Builds the judgment stack for signal, evidence, source evaluation, corroboration, confidence ceilings, claim status, and inference.

reports.title: Information Ecosystems, Source Topologies & Platform Behavior
reports.summary: Maps information routing, origin nodes, source position, bridge nodes, amplification, platform affordances, mutation, stabilization, and resurfacing.
reports.source_filename: C. Information Ecosystems, Source Topologies & Platform Behavior.md
reports.source_path: C. Information Ecosystems, Source Topologies & Platform Behavior.md

reports.title: Topic Discovery, Weak-Signal Detection & Story Emergence
reports.summary: Reframes topic discovery as emergence detection using weak signals, anomalies, recurrence, latent story objects, escalation thresholds, and kill criteria.
reports.source_filename: D. Topic Discovery, Weak-Signal Detection & Story Emergence.md
reports.source_path: D. Topic Discovery, Weak-Signal Detection & Story Emergence.md

reports.title: Narrative Divergence, Coverage Gaps & Missingness Analysis
reports.summary: Interprets comparative rendering, expected-versus-observed visibility, benign and strategic missingness, selective omission, and narrative divergence.
reports.source_filename: E. Narrative Divergence, Coverage Gaps & Missingness Analysis.md
reports.source_path: E. Narrative Divergence, Coverage Gaps & Missingness Analysis.md

reports.title: Thread Following, Link Expansion, and Investigative Graph Construction
reports.summary: Defines entrypoint nodes, next-hop prioritization, expansion operators, typed relations, directional asymmetry, edge status, and graph integrity.
reports.source_filename: F. Thread Following, Link Expansion, and Investigative Graph Construction.md
reports.source_path: F. Thread Following, Link Expansion, and Investigative Graph Construction.md

reports.title: Temporal Dynamics, Trend Formation, and Story Evolution
reports.summary: Separates sequence from temporal meaning through investigative clocks, trigger events, substrate development, temporal regimes, phase transitions, and narrative pivots.
reports.source_filename: G. Temporal Dynamics, Trend Formation, and Story Evolution.md
reports.source_path: G. Temporal Dynamics, Trend Formation, and Story Evolution.md

reports.title: Power, Incentives & Strategic Actor Analysis
reports.summary: Models actors as strategic nodes through incentives, leverage, dependency, control, alignment, coordination, and power geometry.
reports.source_filename: H. Power, Incentives & Strategic Actor Analysis.md
reports.source_path: H. Power, Incentives & Strategic Actor Analysis.md

reports.title: Propaganda, Narrative Laundering & Information Operations
reports.summary: Analyzes narrative operations, seeding, routing, uptake, credibility laundering, false plurality, agenda manipulation, and memetic weaponization.
reports.source_filename: I. Propaganda, Narrative Laundering & Information Operations.md
reports.source_path: I. Propaganda, Narrative Laundering & Information Operations.md

reports.title: Implied Reality, Causal Inference, and Unstated-Truth Extraction
reports.summary: Establishes bounded inference from incomplete evidence through causal pressure, abductive reasoning, knowledge-state inference, hidden constraints, and contradiction resolution.
reports.source_filename: J. Implied Reality, Causal Inference, and Unstated-Truth Extraction.md
reports.source_path: J. Implied Reality, Causal Inference, and Unstated-Truth Extraction.md
